examples: He procured extra cigarettes even though they were rationed
fasten the lock onto the door
she fixed her gaze on the man
This nest egg will ensure a nice retirement for us

meanings.definition: fill or close tightly with or as if with a plug
free from fear or doubt; easy in mind
examples: he was secure that nothing will be held against him
made a secure place for himself in his field

meanings.definition: not likely to fail or give way
examples: a secure hold on her wrist

meanings.definition: immune to attack; incapable of being tampered with
examples: fortifications that made the frontier inviolable
